'''H'rinnrada''' was a female [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]].

==History==
H'rinnrada was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] who was intent only on gaining status within her clan. In fact, she dreamed of founding her own clan some day. She was a callous being, and approached every other [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] as a potential target. She was not known for her subtlety, and would attack her bounties in full view of the public. Her favorite weapons were her modified [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]] and [[neurostaff]]. She was completely untrustworthy and had been known to often turn on her employers immediately after completing her contracts.
